title: Project Metadata, Resources, PyInstaller, and Platform Builds · Code Recall
summary: A delayed puzzle review reconstructs project metadata, resources, pyinstaller, and platform builds from revision, configuration, seed, topology, frontier, predecessor map, state transition, draw record, accessibility report, profile, artifact, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for platform-native signed-off release artifact matrix after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and ev…
objectives: Define package layout, metadata, Python requirement, dependencies, console or GUI entry point, and import-safe startup.
Load licensed package resources without assuming source checkout or current working directory layout.
Inspect PyInstaller analysis, tkinter hooks, Tcl/Tk libraries and data, hidden imports, warnings, and artifact contents.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Launch from a clean user account or machine, exercise create-solve-save-recover-close, and retain artifact identity and diagnostics. Artifact under review: platform-native signed-off release artifact matrix.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

For separate evidence from confidence, solve one convenient seeded maze, omit revision, coordinate and wall invariants, topology oracle, frontier trace, changed algorithm or heuristic, callback ownership, keyboard and structured-text access, native Tk evidence, failure, recovery, and package transfer, then accept a screenshot as maze proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Clean Install Smoke, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Clean Install Smoke
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Clean Install Smoke: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review puzzle team handles case 4730 during a clean desktop release rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile package metadata, resources, Tcl and Tk assets, native artifacts, and clean-install launches; all graph claims need an independent witness; then replace pointer input with a single-action keyboard path. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. Competency probe: Launch from a clean user account or machine, exercise create-solve-save-recover-close, and retain artifact identity and diagnostics.

Evidence target: Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Clean Install Smoke.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Clean Install Smoke, keep Clean Install Smoke connected to executable Python grid, topology, search, event, state, accessibility, package, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Launch from a clean user account or machine, exercise create-solve-save-recover-close, and retain artifact identity and diagnostics.

hints: For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Clean Install Smoke, name the player, revision, Python, Tcl and Tk versions, grid, coordinate, seed, topology, frontier, path, event, state, render, accessibility, package, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Clean Install Smoke precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Clean Install Smoke, trace this concrete input and predict coordinate, wall, topology, frontier, route, callback, transition, render, accessibility, failure, rollback, recovery, and native evidence before reviewing it: A review puzzle team handles case 4730 during a clean desktop release rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile package metadata, resources, Tcl and Tk assets, native artifacts, and clean-install launches; all graph claims need an independent witness; then replace pointer input with a single-action keyboard path. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. Competency probe: Launch from a clean user account or machine, exercise create-solve-save-recover-close, and retain artifact identity and diagnostics.

For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Clean Install Smoke, challenge the documented misconception with changed-grid, seed, wall, generator, solver, weight, heuristic, callback, state, focus, scale, save, package, recovery, and controlled native-transfer evidence: Running from the dist directory on the build host is a clean-install test.
